title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 306.440 - Owner's failure to indicate lienholder on title application, penalty
text:
306.440.  Owner's failure to indicate lienholder on title application, penalty. — Failure by the owner to indicate the lienholder of a lien or encumbrance attached to the outboard motor, motorboat, vessel, or watercraft at time of making application for title is a class A misdemeanor.
(L. 1985 H.B. 280, et al. § 301.740, A.L. 2002 H.B. 2008)
